# Pawvera Grooming

Official website: https://pawveragrooming.com
Operating company: Hangzhou Misishell Import & Export Co., Ltd.
Business role: B2B pet grooming tool sourcing, OEM/ODM coordination and private label project support
Primary contact: WhatsApp +86 152 7058 2230

Important transparency notes:
- Pawvera Grooming works with manufacturing partners and does not claim to be the factory for every model.
- Certificates, test reports, battery documents, MOQ and lead time are confirmed by model and project.
- Named customer case studies are published only with authorization and supporting evidence.

Product models: C28, C59, D88, A53, A83 and P45.


B2B sales email: hzmyshell1015@outlook.com
Primary quotation channel: WhatsApp Business 0086 15270582230
Conversion flow: website inquiry → WhatsApp quotation and negotiation → email for document confirmation.
